title: Seamless Vanilla
description: A client-side visual enhancement modpack for Minecraft Java Edition, inspired by the fluid aesthetics of Actions & Stuff.
body:
# Seamless Vanilla

A Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.8 focused on enhancing the vanilla experience with fluid animations, improved visuals, and immersive audio without changing core gameplay mechanics. This pack brings smooth player and mob animations, dynamic first-person hand movements, visual effects, enhanced sounds, and atmospheric ambience to create a more polished and responsive Minecraft experience.

## Features
- Smooth character and entity animations
- Better hand movements in first-person view
- Enhanced visual effects and particle systems
- Improved environmental sounds and footsteps
- Optimized performance and rendering
- Better cloud rendering and biome blending
- Quality-of-life visual improvements
